title: elaphoglossum angulatum
intro: Elaphoglossum angulatum, also known as the angular elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its reported antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are believed to help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Elaphoglossum angulatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Elaphoglossum angulatum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, often in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
